movie.synopsis: James & Alice (2016) James is a hardworking filmmaker in advertising and his girlfriend Alice works in banking. Against their parent’s wishes, the two marry and the movie revolves around the misunderstandings between them caused by their busy lifestyles. Things take a turn when James meets with a freak car accident.
